resume.raw_text:
=== Naim Bakere - Resume.pdf ===
Naim Bakere  
Bronx, NY 10460 | 929-422-1124  

Objective  

Motivated and goal-oriented college graduate with an Associate Degree in Business to secure a 

position as a translator where I can utilize my linguistic, organizational skills, attention to detail, 

and experience in administrative tasks to contribute effectively to the smooth operation of the 

organization..   

Education  
English Language Learners and International Academy, Bronx, NY        June 2024  

Monroe University, Bronx, NY                                                September 2024- December 2025  
AAS in Business  

Internship Experience  
Dusa STEM 2023-2024 ● Learning Coding (. )Learning (Technical Modeling)  

● Developing (Video Programing)  

Post Secondary Readiness 2023-2024 ● Building a resume , Improving communication skills in 

terms of language, and concentrating on the audience.  
● Teamwork and improving writing skill by explaining the purpose of t(Members of seven) 
● Establishing a plan for college  

CCNY STEM Tech 2021-2022 ● Creating Websites  

● Introduction to basic coding skills. 3 day on weekday  

Speak Hire 2022-2023 ● Practicing time management  

● Learning about business  
● Increasing my leadership skills  

Work Experience  
VIM Store 2020-2022 Bronx, N.Y. 10458  

● Training new hires  
● Organizing store  
● Communicating with customers  
● Ordering products for stock  

Volunteer  
Community Mosque, Masjid al-Ummah 2021-Present ● Assist in setting up prayer 

mats and in also cleaning up afterwards  

Honors/Awards  

All-Region Sportsmanship Award  December 2025 
Dean’s List Fall 2025  
CCNY Stem Tech Completion Certificate 2021-2022 
Soccer Team- Most Improved Player 2024-2025 

Skills  

● Multilingual: English, French, Tchamba, Kotokolie, & Awe  

Sports Teams  
Monroe Express Soccer Team 2024-2025 
Kidsuper Samba Soccer Team 2021-2024  
Kennedy H.S. Soccer Team 2020-2023  Team Captain 

2
